title: OurAirports open data downloads
notes: Use only public civil/reference records in the default dataset. Military-only, tactical, or operationally sensitive rows require maintainer review before publication.

title: UN/LOCODE Code List
license: UNECE UN/LOCODE public code list; redistribution review required
notes: Primary official source for currentness checks. The 2025-1 production package and 2026-06-16 pre-release were reviewed on 2026-07-08, but official UN terms restrict redistribution and derivative compilation, so canonical records continue to cite the approved DataHub mirror until terms are cleared.

title: DataHub UN/LOCODE codelist
notes: Convenience mirror of UNECE UN/LOCODE data used for redistributable canonical records. Syria rows were cross-checked against the official 2025-1 production package and 2026-06-16 pre-release on 2026-07-08.

title: Wikidata
notes: Use for public identifiers and cross-checking, not as the only source for sensitive or ambiguous transport locations.

title: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract
notes: Useful for cross-checking coordinates and names against the geography dataset.

title: OpenSyria Data Geography
license: OpenSyria dataset compilation; upstream source licenses apply
notes: Used to cross-link transport records to reviewed OpenSyria geography localities. Do not use locality names as facility names unless the transport record itself represents that locality.

title: Border Crossings, Syria, March 2014
notes: Compiled by the U.S. Department of State Humanitarian Information Unit and mirrored by Stanford/UC Berkeley GeoData. Use as stable public reference data only; do not infer live crossing status.

title: Syria Border Crossings (HDX, 2015)
notes: Archived HDX mirror of U.S. Department of State Humanitarian Information Unit border crossing data. Use as stable public reference data only; do not infer live crossing status.

title: Syria - Border-crossings, airports and ports updates, 9 March 2026
license: Logistics Cluster Terms of Use; non-commercial humanitarian or academic use with attribution
notes: Use only as dated status snapshot evidence. Do not use this source to overwrite stable crossing identity or infer live access beyond the source publication date.

title: Syria - Coordination Meeting Minutes, 30 April 2026
license: Logistics Cluster Terms of Use; non-commercial humanitarian or academic use with attribution
notes: Use only as dated status snapshot evidence from the 30 April 2026 Syria coordination meeting. Do not use this source to overwrite stable location identity or infer live access beyond the meeting date.

title: Supply Routes Snapshot - Regional Middle East - 25 May 2026
license: Logistics Cluster Terms of Use; non-commercial humanitarian or academic use with attribution
notes: Use only for dated point-location status snapshots where a route table names an existing canonical crossing or port. Route geometry, lead times, and corridor modeling require a separate route dataset review.

title: Middle East Regional Coordination Meeting Minutes, 21 May 2026
license: Logistics Cluster Terms of Use; non-commercial humanitarian or academic use with attribution
notes: Use only as dated status snapshot evidence from the 21 May 2026 Middle East regional coordination meeting. Do not use this source to overwrite stable location identity or infer live access beyond the meeting date. Future BCP expansion and airport rehabilitation statements require separate review.

title: NGA World Port Index (Pub 150)
notes: Use for stable public maritime identifiers, port coordinates, and cross-checking. Do not treat WPI facility fields as live operational status.
